title: phlox × glutinosa
intro: Phlox × glutinosa, also known as perennial phlox or fragrant phlox, is a hybrid plant species within the Phlox genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and hardy growth. The medicinal properties of Phlox × glutinosa lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of consuming or applying Phlox × glutinosa include alleviating symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as promoting relaxation and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Phlox × glutinosa include infusions, teas, and salves, which can be used to create topical treatments for skin issues and respiratory problems.
